description: Look like the king of fashion in these casual brogues from id. The contrast serrated edges on the forefoot add to the class of the footwear, while the foamy footbed is sure to keep you comfortable all day.UpperFull grain multi-layered leather upper for maximum durability and styleTapered toe for comfort and stylePerforations on the forefoot area, patent to broguesLightly padded tongue and collar for a great snug FitLace-up system for a snug, customised fitStitch detailing to enhance shoe lifeMidsoleFull length EVA midsole for comfort and supportCushioned footbed for added comfortOutsoleLightweight, slip-resistant textured rubber outsole for better shock absorptionShoe careWipe surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shineDo not store in direct sunlight
